name: social-sciences
description: Data integration workflows for WCS social sciences data. Used to transfer BNS & NRGT data from KoboToolbox forms to the WCS Programs MS SQL database.

Indonesia-BNS-Household.body:
fn(state => {
  const multiSelectIds = ["hh_type", "KAP_K4", "KAP_K5", "KAP_P2", "KAP_P3", "KAP_P5", "KAP_P6", "KAP_P7", "IMP_D2"];

  function generateUuid(body, uuid) {
    for (const property in body) {
      if (Array.isArray(body[property]) && body !== null) {
        body['__generatedUuid'] = uuid;
        body[property].forEach((thing, i, arr) => {
          if (thing !== null) {
            thing['__parentUuid'] = uuid;
            let newUuid = uuid + '-' + (i + 1);
            thing['__generatedUuid'] = newUuid;
            for (const property in thing) {
              if (Array.isArray(thing[property])) {
                generateUuid(thing, newUuid);
              }
            }
          }
        });
      }
    }
  }

  generateUuid(
    state.data.body,
    state.data.body._id+'-'+state.data.body._xform_id_string
  );

  const { body } = state.data;
  const { _id, _xform_id_string } = body;
  state.data = { ...state.data, ...body };

  return { ...state, _id, _xform_id_string };
}); 
fn(async state => {
 const mapping = {
  FormName: dataValue('formName'),
  DatasetId: dataValue('_xform_id_string'),
  LastUpdated: new Date().toISOString()
} 
 return upsert('WCSPROGRAMS_KoboDataset', "DatasetId", mapping, {setNull: ["''", "'undefined'"]})(state); 
})

fn(async state => {
 const dataArray = state.data.body['hh_members'] || [] 

        const mapping = []; 

        for (let x of dataArray) { 

          mapping.push({
  WCSPROGRAMS_KoboGenderID_Gender: await findValue({uuid: 'wcsprograms_kobogenderid', relation: 'WCSPROGRAMS_KoboGender', where: { WCSPROGRAMS_KoboGenderExtCode: x['hh_members/gender'] }})(state),
  WCSPROGRAMS_KoboEthnicityID_Ethnicity: await findValue({uuid: 'wcsprograms_koboethnicityid', relation: 'WCSPROGRAMS_KoboEthnicity', where: { WCSPROGRAMS_KoboEthnicityExtCode: x['hh_members/ethnicity'] }})(state),
  Birth: x['hh_members/birth'],
  BnsanswerUuid: dataValue('undefined'),
  AnswerId: state._id,
  GeneratedUuid: x['__generatedUuid']
}) 

          } 
 return upsertMany('WCSPROGRAMS_KoboBnsAnswerHhMembers', 'GeneratedUuid', () => mapping, {setNull: ["''", "'undefined'"]})(state); 
}) 
fn(async state => {
 if (state.data['group_dt8cs40/IMP_D2']) { 

                const array = state.data['group_dt8cs40/IMP_D2'].split(' '); 

                const mapping = []; 
 
                for ( let x of array ) { 

                  mapping.push({
  WCSPROGRAMS_KoboImpD2ID: await findValue({uuid: 'wcsprograms_koboimpd2id', relation: 'WCSPROGRAMS_KoboImpD2', where: { WCSPROGRAMS_KoboImpD2ExtCode: x }})(state),
  WCSPROGRAMS_KoboBnsanswerID: await findValue({uuid: 'wcsprograms_kobobnsanswerid', relation: 'WCSPROGRAMS_KoboBnsAnswer', where: { AnswerId: state._id }})(state)
}); 

                } 

             
 return upsertMany('WCSPROGRAMS_KoboBnsanswerImpD2', ["WCSPROGRAMS_KoboImpD2ID", "WCSPROGRAMS_KoboBnsanswerID"], () => mapping, {setNull: ["''", "'undefined'"]})(state); } 
 return state; 
})
